name: Shim Setup
description: Install shim wrapper scripts to a dedicated directory prepended to PATH, ensuring they take priority over any existing binaries.

code.description: Install a `code` shim that delegates to the real `code` CLI or falls back to `code-insiders`.

devcontainer-info.description: Install a `devcontainer-info` shim that queries dev container image metadata from meta.env files.

systemctl.description: Install a `systemctl` shim that delegates to the real systemctl when systemd is running, or prints a helpful message suggesting the `service` command.

logfile.description: Log all output (stdout + stderr) to this file in addition to console.
